metrics.title: Home - Governance Atlas
metrics.textPreview: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center S Skyler Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 74.4% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. EXECUTIVE COMMAND CENTER Databricks-backed · workspace scope Governance posture, at a glance Backed values use live Unity Catalog and governance-store signals; unavailable values are labeled instead of inferred. Export brief Present mode POSTURE 74.4% Trend unavailable THE STATE OF DATAPACT 22 governed assets are in scope. Coverage is 74%. CERTIFIED ASSETS 13 Signal unavailable OPEN EXPOSURES 2 +2 vs 30 days ago CDES TRACKED - Lineage proof unavailable WHAT CHANGED TODAY Coverage 74% Coverage signal unavailable Quality SLA - Quality signal unavailable Open exposures 2 +2 vs 30 days ago Lineage coverage - Lineage signal unavailable GOVERNANCE COVERAGE 74% Signal unavailable CERTIFIED ASSETS 13 Signal unavailable OPEN STEWARDSHIP ITEMS 1 +1 vs 30 days ago OPEN EXPOSURES 2 +2 vs 30 days ago Coverage trend · last 12 weeks i Share of productionized assets meeting baseline policy 12w 26w 52w Trend history unavailable Trend unavailable over the last 12 weeks SLA: >=90% by end of Q2 Projection unavailable Posture by domain i Coverage x visible asset count Product 96% 3 assets Customer 92% 3 assets Marketing 88% 3 assets Operations 88% 3 assets Finance 83% 3 assets Risk breakdown i Open exposures by severity - RISK-CLEAN Open exposures 2 Medium-risk

markdownSafety.html:
Workspace-scoped governed evidence found 4 critical assets that are not Certified.

  • datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.marketing_lien_outreach_signal - Marketing / Trusted / marketing-steward@entrada.ai, metadata-platform@entrada.ai
  • datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.product_market_fit_signal - Product / Trusted / metadata-platform@entrada.ai
  • datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.customer_identity_quality - Customer / Uncertified / customer-steward@entrada.ai, metadata-platform@entrada.ai
  • datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.customer_stewardship_queue - Customer / Trusted / customer-steward@entrada.ai, metadata-platform@entrada.ai

Genie cannot run for this actor until Databricks OBO is available, so this answer uses only live Unity Catalog inventory and Governance Atlas control-plane metadata.
markdownSafety.text: Workspace-scoped governed evidence found 4 critical assets that are not Certified. datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.marketing_lien_outreach_signal - Marketing / Trusted / marketing-steward@entrada.ai, metadata-platform@entrada.ai datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.product_market_fit_signal - Product / Trusted / metadata-platform@entrada.ai datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.customer_identity_quality - Customer / Uncertified / customer-steward@entrada.ai, metadata-platform@entrada.ai datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.customer_stewardship_queue - Customer / Trusted / customer-steward@entrada.ai, metadata-platform@entrada.ai Genie cannot run for this actor until Databricks OBO is available, so this answer uses only live Unity Catalog inventory and Governance Atlas control-plane metadata.

markdownSafety.html:
Workspace-scoped governed evidence found 4 critical assets that are not Certified.

  • datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.marketing_lien_outreach_signal - Marketing / Trusted / marketing-steward@entrada.ai, metadata-platform@entrada.ai
  • datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.product_market_fit_signal - Product / Trusted / metadata-platform@entrada.ai
  • datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.customer_identity_quality - Customer / Uncertified / customer-steward@entrada.ai, metadata-platform@entrada.ai
  • datapact.enterprise_metadata_ops.customer_stewardship_queue - Customer / Trusted / customer-steward@entrada.ai, metadata-platform@entrada.ai

Genie cannot run for this actor until Databricks OBO is available, so this answer uses only live Unity Catalog inventory and Governance Atlas control-plane metadata.

EXECUTIVE COMMAND CENTER Databricks-backed · workspace scope Governance posture, at a glance Backed values use live Unity Catalog and governance-store signals; unavailable values are labeled instead of inferred. Export brief Present mode POSTURE 74.4% Trend unavailable THE STATE OF DATAPACT 22 governed assets are in scope. Coverage is 74%. CERTIFIED ASSETS 13 Signal unavailable OPEN EXPOSURES 2 +2 vs 30 days ago CDES TRACKED - Lineage proof unavailable WHAT CHANGED TODAY Coverage 74% Coverage signal unavailable Quality SLA - Quality signal unavailable Open exposures 2 +2 vs 30 days ago Lineage coverage - Lineage signal unavailable GOVERNANCE COVERAGE 74% Signal unavailable CERTIFIED ASSETS 13 Signal unavailable OPEN STEWARDSHIP ITEMS 1 +1 vs 30 days ago OPEN EXPOSURES 2 +2 vs 30 days ago Coverage trend · last 12 weeks i Share of productionized assets meeting baseline policy 12w 26w 52w Trend history unavailable Trend unavailable over the last 12 weeks SLA: >=90% by end of Q2 Projection unavailable Posture by domain i Coverage x visible asset count Product 96% 3 assets Customer 92% 3 assets Marketing 88% 3 assets Operations 88% 3 assets Finance 83% 3 assets Risk breakdown i Open exposures by severity - RISK-CLEAN Open exposures 2 Medium-risk

Notifications
Help
Coverage trend · last 12 weeks: Historical posture snapshots are shown only when available.
Posture by domain: Domain scores use backed command-center domain signals when available.
Open discovery for Product domain posture
Open discovery for Customer domain posture
Open discovery for Marketing domain posture
Open discovery for Operations domain posture
Open discovery for Finance domain posture
Risk breakdown: Risk distribution renders unavailable unless explicit exposure severity signals are present.
Open stewardship for open exposures
Open audit evidence for medium-risk findings
Open audit evidence for informational risk findings
Top catalogs · health snapshot: Catalog rows are derived from visible asset inventory and backed metadata coverage fields.
Critical data elements: CDE rows require backed CDE registry data or asset-level critical-element metadata.
Activity stream: Recent activity uses audit/governance events returned by the command-center API.
